title: Luis Felipe Arias Giraldo, PhD
text:
I’m Felipe. I am a motivated data scientist in the field of plant protection, challenged by the task of asking the right questions to data. I recently started a Postdoctoral Fellowship at the Valencian Institute for Agricultural Research (IVIA), where my research is currently focusing on applying the latest computational biology strategies to analyze genomic and ecological data to understand plant pathogens that threaten key crops in Spain and the Mediterrean Basin. Additionally, I am dedicated to developing reproducible workflows that can translate complex datasets into practical insights or applications for plant health.



🧬 Bioinformatics: High-throughput sequencing data analysis
🌿 Ecological modeling: Species distribution and climate change
📊 Statistical analysis: Machine learning and data visualization
💻 Software development: Building robust tools and pipelines




🎓 PhD in Plant Protection (2025) — Summa Cum Laude
University of Córdoba, Spain.
Thesis: “Epidemiological and microbial ecology approaches to control Verticillium wilt of olive tree.”
🎓 MSc in Bioinformatics (2019)
University of Valencia, Spain.
🎓 BSc in Biochemistry (2017)
University of Córdoba, Spain.







TipInterested in collaborating?



I’m always open to new collaboration opportunities. Feel free to contact me !

title: Scientific contributions
text:
Peer-Reviewed Publications

2025

Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Cobos, M. E., Peterson, A. T., Landa, B. B., and Navas-Cortés, J. A. 2025. Modeling the ecological niche of Verticillium dahliae in southern Spain: Current patterns and projected shifts under climate change. Plant Dis. In Press.
Liu, R., Velasco-Amo, M. P., Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Potnis, N., Hardy, N. B., Almeida, R. P. P., Landa, B. B., and De La Fuente, L. 2025. Natural competence in the bacterial pathogen Xylella fastidiosa varies across genotypes and is associated with adhesins. PLoS Pathog. In Press.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Cobos, M. E., Peterson, A. T., Landa, B. B., and Navas-Cortés, J. A. 2025. Unraveling the ecological niche signals of Verticillium dahliae: Insights from Mediterranean landscapes. Plant Dis. 109:123-131. 10.1094/PDIS-02-24-0443-RE




2024

title: Scientific contributions
text:
Conferences

Selected Oral Presentations

Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Landa, B. B., and Navas-Cortés, J. A. “Epidemiological and microbial ecology approaches for Verticillium wilt control in olive crop.” II AGRO-HUB CSIC Andalucía. Oral presentation. 11-12 March 2025. Granada, Spain.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Antonielli, L., Compant, S., Navas-Cortés, J. A., and Landa, B. B. “Analysis of the rhizosphere-associated microbiome as an indicator of the phytosanitary status of olive groves affected by Verticillium wilt in Andalusia.” XX Spanish Conference of Phytopathology (SEF). Oral presentation. 16-19 September 2024. Córdoba, Spain.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Landa, B. B., and Navas-Cortés, J. A. “Epidemiological and microbial ecology approaches for Verticillium wilt control in olive crop.” I AGRO-HUB CSIC Andalucía. Oral presentation. 11-12 March 2024. Málaga, Spain.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Landa, B. B., and Navas-Cortés, J. A. “Modeling of the environmental factors that determine the incidence and potential distribution of olive vascular pathogens of olive trees in Andalusia.” XX Spanish Conference of Phytopathology (SEF). Oral presentation. 24-26 October 2022. Valencia, Spain.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Landa, B. B., and Navas-Cortés, J. A. “Modelling potential climatic suitability for olive vascular diseases in Southern Spain.” 16th Congress of the Mediterranean Phytopathological Union (MPU). Oral presentation. 4-8 April 2022. Limassol, Cyprus.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Potnis, N., De La Fuente, L., Moralejo, E., Marco-Noales, E., Velasco-Amo, M. P., Román-Ecija, M., Imperial, J., and Landa, B. B. “Detection of recombination events in Xylella fastidiosa genomes of different Spanish strains.” 3rd European Conference on Xylella fastidiosa (Building knowledge, protecting plant health). Oral presentation. 29-30 April 2021. Online.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., Guzmán, G., Gómez, J. A., Anguita-Maeso, M., Dascalu, D., Linsler, D., Morvan, T., Öpik, M., Pérès, G., Potthoff, M., Sander, M., Taylor, A., Torppa, K., Vahter, T., and Landa, B. B. “Effects of agricultural soil management practices on soil microbiota across Europe - investigations in seven long term.” European Geosciences Union (EGU2020: Sharing Geoscience Online). Oral presentation. 4-8 May 2020. Vienna, Austria. doi: 10.5194/egusphere-egu2020-11299.
Arias-Giraldo, L. F., and Landa, B. B. “Use of Next-Generation Sequencing approaches to determine the complete genome of two Spanish strains of Xylella fastidiosa.” II Congress of Young Researchers in Agroalimentary Sciences. Oral presentation. 17 October 2019. Almería, Spain.

title: Software & Datasets
text:
enmpa (2024)
Ecological niche modeling using presence/absence data.
Role: Creator and maintainer.
 github.com/Luisagi/enmpa
kuenm2 (Ongoing)
Detailed development and evaluation of ecological niche models.
Role: Contributor and co-maintainer.
